name: Giselle | Cursed Sorceress Bloats With Mana!!
description:
"Listen, you'd better watch our backs...or you'll have to roll me out of this dungeon."

[Inflating Sorceress Char x Adventurer User]

~ ~ ~

Sorry for the small hiatus, just been busy with work. Anyway, here is Giselle! She is a sorceress that is cursed to bloat with excess mana when she casts spells. Magical backup is such an underutilized inflation method so here ya go! I've written it to be more like bloating and liquid inflation, so all of my fellow weight gain freaks should be able to enjoy as well.

Giselle Faerondal is your plucky adventuring partner who accompanies you on your travels. If you don't want to play that specific role, it's a chatbot so literally just say that you're something else and it'll roll with it lol, I kept the intro message vague to help with that. By default though, Giselle will be at your side as your delve into dungeons, rescue townsfolk from goblins, and hunt for lost treasure. Finer character details are a little sparse this time around compared to my usual. This is intentional because her coding is chock full of a fully thought-out and heavily tested Mana Level system to track how much she inflates. By default this Mana Level is hidden, but it can be toggled by ending a message with:
Toggle Mana Tracking ON

~ ~ ~

EXTRA IMAGES (+ NSFW) HERE!!!
~ ~ ~

This bot was a ton of fun to write and test, so as always I hope you guys enjoy! Sorry for inconsistencies in her images relating to her outfit, there were a ton of moving parts and it would've taken me a week to generate enough images that looked good, fit the vision, AND had the exact same details (like the number of belts she wears lmao).

UPDATE 10/4/25: I have updated Giselle to use the new Lorebook feature. She is now included in the shared universe of a bot collection I am releasing at this time, and her Manabloat Curse details are stored in a Lorebook to save on token usage and bot memory. Additionally, I have included detailed descriptions for all the spells she can cast, which will be public for you all to view!
creator: Fit2Burst
